title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Google DeepMind researchers at Cambridge used AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to accelerate drug discovery against antimicrobial resistance by analyzing bacterial defense mechanisms. The process was compressed from years to minutes by combining structural biology with AI tools.
